channel.title: Convergence — Blog
channel.description: Blended finance news and insights from Convergence.

item.title: Blended Finance State of the Market 2026
item.description: Convergence's annual report on blended finance flows reports $15B committed in 2025 across 72 deals. Climate adaptation and primary healthcare are the fastest-growing sectors.

item.title: First-loss tranches: design guide for emerging managers
item.description: Design patterns for first-loss tranches in emerging manager funds, with case studies from foundations deploying MRI capital as catalytic first-loss in African debt funds.
